ai_settings.title: LOUIS AI Config
ai_settings.desc: Manage language models, API interfaces and ReAct agent parameters
ai_settings.text_gen_desc: Configure dynamic parameters & system prompts for the content drafting tool
ai_settings.system_instructions_desc: Define style guidelines here (e.g. politeness, branding, handling of salutations or placeholders).
ai_settings.system_instructions_placeholder: You are an advanced text generation AI for the Louis Smart CRM system. Write the requested text elegantly, precisely and error-free...
ai_settings.creativity_desc: Low (0.1) = Predictable texts; High (0.9) = More varied sentences.
ai_settings.max_tokens_desc: Maximum number of generated output token words.
ai_settings.provider_desc: Select the appropriate AI provider for your system.
ai_settings.no_models_found: No models returned. Please check your API keys or URL.
ai_settings.rag_accordion_desc: Interfaces for document splitting, vector dimensions and content chunking (Ollama, Gemini, OpenAI).
ai_settings.rag_api_key_placeholder: Leave unchanged if empty or local
ai_settings.memory_title: 🧠 AI Long-term Memory & Response Preferences (User Memory)
ai_settings.memory_desc: Personalize the long-term memory of your LOUIS ReAct agent. Set global agreements, response styles, or system-wide persona guidelines. Also, review the CRM notes automatically aggregated in short-term memory here.
ai_settings.memory_preferences_placeholder: e.g., You are a professional, tax-sensitive financial assistant. Always reply in English, keep offers in tabular format, and formulate concisely.
ai_settings.memory_db_desc: Maintenance tools for persistent AI contexts, customer profiles, and accompanying RAG background knowledge.
ai_settings.memory_content_placeholder: Enter your knowledge, a conversation summary, or system guidelines here...
ai_settings.memory_rag_checkbox_label: Add directly to the RAG knowledge database (vector short-term memory)
ai_settings.files_upload_desc: Will be provided in the Louis system vault for RAG document processing
ai_settings.files_status_action_ingest_tooltip: Parse this document and make it available for the Louis AI in the RAG vector storage
ai_settings.notes_empty_user: No internal knowledge notes have been created so far.
ai_settings.safety_hint_desc: Your API keys are stored in a highly isolated manner for your tenant in the system. Louis CRM AI uses ReAct orchestration to accompany all database activities in real-time, but denies the artificial intelligence direct write permissions on live CRM data.

search_settings.title: Web Search Settings
search_settings.desc: Choose the search engine provider for ReAct agent searches and configure parameters such as URL, categories, or Google API interfaces
search_settings.searxng_desc: SearXNG (Meta search engine - JSON API interface - Recommended ⭐ & privacy-friendly)
search_settings.google_grounding_desc: Google Search Grounding (Not recommended - Data sharing with Google)
search_settings.google_custom_desc: Google Custom Search JSON API (Not recommended - External Google interface)
search_settings.google_grounding_privacy_warn_desc: With this method, the LLM (Gemini-3.5-flash) performs the web search independently via Google's search index. Since query data is transmitted to Google and complete data sovereignty is not guaranteed, this method is not recommended by default for privacy reasons.
search_settings.google_custom_privacy_warn_title: ⚠️ Privacy Notice: Google Custom Search API
search_settings.google_custom_privacy_warn_desc: This method retrieves search results via Google's programmable Custom Search interface. For privacy reasons, the use of this API is discouraged, as metadata and searches are transmitted directly to Google. Usage also requires your own API key and a Custom Search Engine ID (CX).
search_settings.searxng_categories_desc: Determines which main topics should be queried on SearXNG (Default: general)

workflows_tab.title: LOUIS AI Workflows
workflows_tab.desc: Manage learned tools and automated sequences of the ReAct Agent
workflows_tab.info_desc: When you speak with LOUIS AI, the artificial intelligence learns to register new workflows (custom tools) for complex, recurring task sequences. These workflows bündeln chained actions (e.g., CRM analyses followed by web search or RAG information retrieval) to handle time-consuming routine tasks autonomously in the background.
workflows_tab.id_desc: A unique identifier without special characters that Louis can call directly as a functional tool.
workflows_tab.purpose_placeholder: e.g., Analyzes outstanding invoices and searches for company profiles on the web
workflows_tab.step_instruction_label: Explicit Prompt / Action Instruction for this step
workflows_tab.step_instruction_placeholder: e.g., Get all outstanding invoices with status 'pending'
workflows_tab.search_placeholder: Select workflows by name or function...
workflows_tab.empty_desc: No custom workflows have been indexed for this tenant so far. You can generate a new sequence using the button on the top right!
workflows_tab.inspector_empty: Select a workflow from the list to load and inspect the detailed chain and action workflows.

ai_generator.title: Generate with AI
ai_generator.api_key_hint: AI Interface Message: {{message}}. Please ensure your Gemini API key is configured in the Admin Panel.
ai_generator.improve_default_prompt: Rephrase the following text to be more professional, elegant, and error-free. Keep the exact meaning intact.
ai_generator.create_default_prompt: Create an engaging, well-structured draft matching the context.
ai_generator.quick_professional_prompt: Rephrase this to be significantly more professional, business-like, and formal.
ai_generator.quick_shorter_prompt: Make the text shorter, more concise, and straight to the point.
ai_generator.quick_friendly_prompt: Make the tone warmer, more friendly, and express gratitude.
ai_generator.quick_longer_prompt: Expand the text further and add professional-sounding details.
